Void Community Repository

__ARCH__ packages

Add this repository to XBPS

  1. Create the config entry: 
    echo repository=__REPO_URL__ | sudo tee /etc/xbps.d/00-VUR.conf
  2. Sync and accept fingerprint: 
    sudo xbps-install -S
  3. Install packages: 
    sudo xbps-install -S <package>

Available packages

repo by oSoWoSo served by oscloud.cz
